test_cases.expected_behavior: Return the maximum value in the list.

test_cases.buggy_code:
def greet(user):
    return user.name.upper()
test_cases.test_code:
assert greet(None) == ''
class U:
    name = 'alice'
assert greet(U()) == 'ALICE'

test_cases.buggy_code:
def process(item):
    return item.value * 2
test_cases.expected_behavior: Return None or 0 when item is None.
test_cases.test_code:
assert process(None) is None
class Item:
    value = 5
assert process(Item()) == 10

test_cases.expected_behavior: Convert string to int before multiplication.
